evals.prompt: I just wrote a new Angular service for user authentication. Can you generate tests for it? The file is src/app/services/auth.service.ts.
evals.expected_output: Detects Angular/Karma or Jest framework, generates a .spec.ts file with tests covering login, logout, token refresh, error handling. Follows existing test patterns in the project.

evals.prompt: 테스트 생성해줘. 방금 수정한 Python API 핸들러에 대해서 regression test가 필요해.
evals.expected_output: Identifies changed functions via git diff, generates pytest regression tests verifying existing behavior still holds, plus new tests for any added functionality.

evals.prompt: I added a bunch of new utility functions but forgot to write tests. Can you add tests for everything in src/utils/?
evals.expected_output: Scans all files in src/utils/, detects the test framework, generates test files matching the project's naming convention with tests for each exported function.
